Description: The 10 ms task shall service every active component each cycle.
Every software component shall expose an Init and a cyclic Step entry point.
BodyControl lighting configuration shall be calibratable.
BodyControl lighting runtime state shall be observable.
BodyControl lighting input signals shall be scaled before use.
BodyControl lighting shall compute a filtered, clamped output.
BodyControl lighting Step shall update phase and latch faults.
BodyControl lighting shall provide a self-test returning health.
